clusters.title: Virtual Threads Hit Production: Real-World Lessons from Java 21 Deployments
clusters.summary: Multiple teams report their experiences migrating to virtual threads in production Java 21 applications. Key findings: throughput improvements of 3-5x for I/O-bound workloads, but subtle pinning issues with synchronized blocks remain a common pitfall.

articles.title: [java] Our experience migrating to Virtual Threads in production
articles.summary: A detailed post-mortem of migrating a high-throughput microservice from thread pools to virtual threads. Throughput increased 4x but synchronized JDBC connections caused carrier thread pinning.

articles.title: Understanding Virtual Thread Pinning in Java 21
articles.summary: Official guide from the Java team explaining when and why virtual threads get pinned to carrier threads, with practical solutions for common frameworks.

clusters.title: GraalVM 24 Native Image: Zero-Configuration Metadata Repository
clusters.summary: GraalVM 24 introduces automatic metadata detection, eliminating the need for manual reflection configuration files in most Spring and Quarkus applications.

articles.title: GraalVM 24: Native Image Gets Smarter
articles.summary: GraalVM 24 ships with a built-in metadata repository that automatically handles reflection, JNI, and resource registration for 200+ popular libraries.

clusters.title: Hibernate ORM 7.0.0.Final
clusters.summary: Hibernate 7 reaches GA with Jakarta Data support, improved HQL parser, and native SoftDelete annotations.

articles.title: Hibernate ORM 7.0.0.Final
articles.summary: Major release bringing Jakarta Data 1.0 integration, rewritten HQL parser with better error messages, and native @SoftDelete support without Envers.

bullets: Jakarta Data 1.0 support for repository-style data access.
Rewritten HQL parser with context-aware error messages.
Improved batch fetching for collections and lazy associations.
